who: procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies managing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement teams in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, inefficient management causes missed deadlines and supplier penalties. We simplify contract management instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and email reminders.
problem: Inefficient management of vendor contracts leading to missed deadlines and penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement teams seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about contract management
DM outreach to procurement teams with a demo link
Contribute to forums where procurement teams discuss tools
try_it: Let users try contract alert notifications and status tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for notifications
Enable CSV import for existing vendor data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
